The all whites currently find themselves on eighth place in the table, three points behind leaders Sunderland who they play […] The post Three key Leeds players facing punishment by EFL appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou blown away by what ex-Leeds United man Archie Gray did in Tottenham win
arts.sum: When asked why he decided to swap Gray and Ben Davies' positions in the second half, Postecoglou said: "I felt like we were starting to get on top and stronger. Archie has got a great capacity to run, and I thought putting him at left-back he would be able to get forward for us more, and Ben with his ability to defend and his left-foot meant he could get the ball out to the left side.

arts.ttl: Leeds United man confirms he’s in the squad tonight after recent injury blow
arts.sum: Injuries to Ethan Ampadu, Isaac Schmidt, Manor Solomon, Max Wöber and Dan James were already far from ideal, but Ilia Gruev’s knee issue forced him off at Carrow Road and now looks set to keep him out for “months” . However, Schmidt looks all set for at least a return to the squad tonight after previous glute problems that kept him out of the draw at Norwich City.

arts.ttl: 'Doesn't deserve it' Leeds United's Gnonto being picked on amid integrity doubts
arts.sum: Referees are not treating Wilfried Gnonto fairly as he continues to adapt to English football with Leeds United. Daniel Farke felt his winger should have been awarded said penalty and criticised the way officials are dealing with Gnonto.

arts.ttl: Leeds United confirm worst injury fears with months not weeks on the sidelines expected
arts.sum: A statement said: “ Leeds United midfielder and Bulgaria international Ilia Gruev sustained an injury to his right knee during the club’s Championship draw with Norwich City at Carrow Road on Tuesday, which saw him withdrawn in the 20th minute. Months, not weeks, is Leeds United’s fear when it comes to Ilia Gruev’s recovery from what the club has described as a serious meniscus injury.
